title: My Daughter Stole My Farm And Evicted Me Into A Trailer. So I Bought It Back At Auction
description: I cashed out my teaching pension to build a wedding venue for my daughter, but she and her husband evicted me, stole my identity, and sold the farm. I handed their PPP fraud evidence to the SBA, watched them get convicted, and bought the property back at auction for $112k, reopening as 'Second Chance Weddings'. #FamilyBetrayal #RevengeStory #JusticeServed
thumb_text: THEY STOLE MY FARM, I BOUGHT IT BACK AT AUCTION

thumb_lines.text: SHE TOLD GUESTS I STOLE MONEY
THEY TOOK PPP LOANS IN MY NAME, I SENT EVIDENCE TO THE SBA
